SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [RDM].[AFFILIATES_SRS_MAPPING]
( 

	AffiliateName [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	Division [nvarchar](20)  NULL,
	ContractType [nvarchar](20)  NULL,
	srs_id [int]  NULL,
	LP_LeadSubSource [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	LP_LeadSourceCode [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	AlternateNames [nvarchar](255)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
